Title.Value: Desktop Window Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

Notes.Title: Description
Notes.Value: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Desktop Window Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

Notes.Title: FAQ
Notes.Value:
What privileges could be gained by an attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability?

An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could gain SYSTEM privileges.

CWE.Value: Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type ('Type Confusion')

Name.Value: Microsoft Threat Intelligence Center (MSTIC) & Microsoft Security Response Center (MSRC)
Microsoft Threat Intelligence Center (MSTIC) & Microsoft Security Response Center (MSRC)
